gateway_token: <OpenClaw gateway bearer token — sent as Authorization: Bearer for /v1/chat/completions>
elevenlabs_api_key: <ElevenLabs API key (sk_...); leave empty if not using the ElevenLabs provider>
deepgram_api_key: <Deepgram API key; leave empty if not using the Deepgram provider. Overridden by the DEEPGRAM_API_KEY env var if set.>
